portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Consolidated view of opportunities, contracts and projects.
portfolio.statusDistributionDesc: Project count per status. Color is the one configured in the project status catalog.
portfolio.topClientsDesc: Top 10 clients by sum of expected revenue across their projects.
portfolio.topProjectsDesc: Top 10 projects by expected revenue. Click to open.

kpi.tenantRevenueHint: Sum of {{count}} project(s) with Dynamic Entries

dashboard.recentDescription: Latest modified projects — click to open.
dashboard.tableEmpty: No projects yet. Create the first one.
dashboard.statusDistDescription: Count of projects in each state.
dashboard.topMarginDesc: Projects with Dynamic Entries filled, sorted by margin.
dashboard.monthlyDesc: Last 12 months. Useful to spot funnel seasonality.
dashboard.monthlyEmpty: No projects created in the last 12 months.
dashboard.geoDesc: Top 12 states by total opportunity value. Resolves state from the client company record.

geoLabel.hover: Hover over a state to see details
geoLabel.hoverClick: Hover for details — click to filter projects

dashboard.workloadDesc: Open tasks and milestones per user. Spot who's overloaded.

projects.subtitle: Projects from your tenant.
projects.newSubtitle: Detailed fields can be filled later inside the project tabs.
projects.createError: Could not create the project. Try again.
projects.loadError: Could not load the project list. Try reloading the page.
projects.onlyMine: Filter projects where I'm in team, owner or task/milestone responsible

lost.subtitle: Opportunities with lost status. Review why we lost.
lost.kpiValueHint: Sum of net revenue computed from lost opportunities.

board.title: Opportunities Kanban
board.subtitle: Drag cards between columns to change project status.
board.noStatuses: Add at least one Project Status under Catalogs to use the Kanban.

funnel.title: Sales funnel
funnel.subtitle: Number of projects in each stage. Click a bar to filter.
funnel.empty: Not enough data to draw the funnel. Add statuses and assign them to projects.

projects.emptyHint: Create the first project to start building ROI analyses.
projects.emptyFilteredHint: Adjust or clear filters to see more results.

history.subtitle: Timeline of important events for this project.
history.empty: No events yet. As the project progresses, records will appear here (status changes, milestones, allocations).

comments.subtitle: Team comment feed. Use it to record decisions, questions and context that don't fit in tasks.
comments.empty: No comments yet. Be the first to leave a note.
comments.allResolved: All comments resolved. Toggle "Show resolved" to see history.

attachments.subtitle: Project documents via external link (Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive, etc).
attachments.empty: No attachments yet. Paste the link of the contract, proposal or invoice.
attachments.deleteDesc: "{{title}}" will be removed (the external link remains intact).

schedule.subtitle: Project delivery milestones. Use to track deadlines with the delivery team.
schedule.empty: No milestones yet. Add the first to start the schedule.
schedule.ganttHint: Hover a milestone to see details and planned vs actual variance.

forecast.tableDesc: Compare engine-projected revenue with actual. Update paid status by month.

tasks.empty: No tasks yet. Click "New task" to start.

info.title: Project info
info.teamDescription: People allocated to this project. They see it in their "My agenda".
info.customFieldsDescription: Extra fields configured in the Custom Fields catalog.

dynamic.title: Dynamic Entries
dynamic.subtitle: Each line references a catalog item. Category, financial type and default value are inherited automatically.
dynamic.empty: No entries yet. Click "Add entry" to start.
dynamic.emptyFiltered: No entries match the current filters.

entradas.title: Dynamic Entries
entradas.description: Create custom categories. Each category has its own rows and can be marked as revenue or cost.
entradas.migrateHint: Detected legacy data (licHw/mob/capex/cogs/etc) — convert into categories
entradas.migrateNoData: No legacy category found — marked as migrated.
entradas.migrateDesc: Detected {{count}} legacy categories ({{names}}). {{groups}} new Dynamic Entries will be created. Legacy fields will NOT be deleted.
entradas.empty: No custom categories. Click "New category" above to start.
entradas.removeDesc: The category and all its rows will be removed. Changes must be saved to apply on the server.

resumo.title: Summary & Chart
resumo.description: Consolidated view of the project over {{prazo}} months. Commission, taxes and term parameters are edited under "Financial".
resumo.monthlyDescription: Net revenue (after financial), investment, costs and result by month.

financeiro.paramsDescription: Applied to gross revenue. Result and payback are recomputed live below.
financeiro.kpisDescription: Calculated live from the parameters above and the Dynamic Entries data.

kpi.peakTroughHint: Highest + and lowest − over the term

catalogs.title: Catalogs
catalogs.subtitle: Administrative settings for support lists (statuses, sources, types, etc.).

detail.emptyHint: Click "New" to add the first one.
detail.deleteDesc: "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Saved tenant reports. Click one to see details and run it.
reports.loadError: Could not load the report list.

scheduled.title: Scheduled reports
scheduled.subtitle: Automatic email dispatches (daily, weekly or monthly).

search.title: Advanced search
search.subtitle: Structured filters over your projects. Use presets or type the syntax.

forecast.title: Rolling Forecast
forecast.subtitle: Tenant-wide view of next {{months}} months. Per-scenario adjustments for what-if analysis.
forecast.empty: No data to project. Create projects with forecast.

kpi.expectedHint: Sum of expected over next {{months}} months

forecast.chartHint: Colored bars: scenario expected · dark bars: actual.
forecast.adjustmentsHint: Use adjustments to simulate cancellations, delays or growth. Does not change project data.
forecast.adjustmentsEmpty: No adjustments in this scenario. Use adjustments for what-if scenarios.
forecast.removeAdjustmentDesc: This adjustment will be removed from the scenario.

me.title: Good morning, {{name}}.
me.subtitle: Your pending items and today's projects.
me.allClearSubtitle: No overdue tasks, near-due milestones or stalled projects. Keep it up!
me.summaryLine: {{projects}} projects · {{tasks}} tasks · {{milestones}} milestones under your responsibility

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Edit your profile, change your password, and configure two-factor authentication.

profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.saveError: Could not update. Please try again.

password.title: Password
password.description: To change your password, we will email you a reset link.
password.sent: Reset link sent. Check your email.

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
mfa.enabled: 2FA is ON. You need a code from your authenticator on each new device.
mfa.disabled: Add an extra layer of security with an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password).
mfa.step1: 1. Open your authenticator app and scan the QR code below.
mfa.disablePrompt: To disable 2FA, enter your current authenticator code.
mfa.successMsg: Save the recovery codes below in a safe place — they let you sign in if you lose your authenticator app. They will NOT be shown again.
mfa.errSetup: Could not start setup. Try again.

admin.title: Administration
admin.subtitle: Cross-tenant settings: users, profiles, plans, functionalities and clients.

branding.subtitle: System branding. Values here appear in the sidebar, login screen, favicon, and transactional emails.

field.systemNameHint: Shown in the sidebar and as the browser tab title.
field.logoHint: Main logo — shown in the sidebar (up to 32px tall) and in transactional emails. PNG or transparent SVG recommended.
field.faviconHint: Icon shown in the Chrome tab. PNG, SVG or ICO. Ideally square, 32×32 or 64×64.

workflow.subtitle: {{count}} status transition rule(s) configured. Master only.
workflow.deleteDesc: "{{name}}" will be removed. Transitions will no longer be blocked by this rule.
workflow.empty: No rules yet. Create one to require approval or checklist on critical transitions.

field.name: Rule name
field.fromCategoryHint: If empty, the rule activates on any transition TO the destination below.
field.requiresFieldsHint: Comma-separated list. Accepts project fields (name, status) or payload (totalRevenue, startDate, clientName).
field.requiresChecklistPlaceholder:
Contract signed
PO received
Kick-off scheduled
field.requiresChecklistHint: User must check each item before confirming the transition.
field.thresholdValueHint: If set, approval is only required when project totalRevenue is ≥ this value. Empty = always required.
field.requiresApproversHint: Each approver must approve individually. The transition stays pending until all approve.

users.subtitle: {{count}} users registered.
users.deleteDesc: "{{name}}" will be deleted. Active sessions will not be revoked immediately.

field.name: Name
field.clientHint: Default tenant. If the list below is empty, this will be the only accessible one.
field.clientIdsHint: Check the clients this user can access via tenant switch. The primary client is included automatically.
field.timezoneHint: Dates and times displayed for this user use this timezone. Empty = use tenant or browser timezone.

profiles.subtitle: {{count}} access profiles.
profiles.deleteDesc: "{{name}}" will be deleted. Users with this profile will lose permissions.
profiles.applyDefaultsDesc: Creates 4 profiles (Admin, Sales, Delivery, Finance) with suggested functionalities. Does not overwrite existing.
profiles.applyDefaultsAlready: Default profiles already exist. None created.

plans.subtitle: {{count}} subscription plans.
plans.deleteDesc: "{{name}}" will be deleted. Clients on this plan must be reassigned.

functionalities.subtitle: {{count}} functionalities.
functionalities.deleteDesc: "{{name}}" will be removed from referencing profiles and plans.

clients.subtitle: {{count}} tenants registered.
clients.deleteDesc: "{{name}}" and its data will be deleted. Make backups first.

field.name: Tenant name
field.timezoneHint: Timezone applied to dates/times shown to all users of this client (unless the user has their own timezone).

imports.title: Imports
imports.subtitle: Bulk import companies, contacts and opportunities from CSV files.
imports.errEmpty: File is empty or has no rows.
imports.errParse: Error parsing CSV. Check encoding (UTF-8) and delimiter.
imports.errMapping: Map all required fields before continuing.

upload.title: Select CSV file
upload.description: We accept UTF-8 files with comma or semicolon delimiter.

mapping.title: Column mapping
mapping.description: For each target field, pick which CSV column should fill it.

preview.title: Preview
preview.description: Showing the first 10 rows. Total to import: {{count}}.

companies.title: Import Companies
companies.subtitle: Create multiple companies from a CSV.

contacts.title: Import Contacts
contacts.subtitle: Create contacts linking to company by name (case-insensitive).

opportunities.title: Import Opportunities
opportunities.subtitle: Create projects/opportunities. Status and currency have defaults if missing.

audit.title: Audit
audit.subtitle: System events (login, create/edit/delete entities) for your tenant. Read-only.

errors.locked: Account temporarily locked after too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait before trying again.
errors.unexpected: Could not sign in right now. Please try again.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor verification
twoFactor.subtitleTotp: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
twoFactor.subtitleRecovery: Enter one of the recovery codes you saved

errors.tokenExpired: Verification session expired. Sign in again.
errors.unexpected: Could not verify the code. Try again.

mfaSetup.title: Two-factor setup required
mfaSetup.message: Your account requires two-factor authentication. For now, please configure it through the legacy app — full setup will be available here soon.

forgotPassword.title: Recover access
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we will send you password reset instructions.
forgotPassword.success: If the email is registered, you will receive instructions shortly.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.description: Choose a strong password with at least 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, numbers and one special character.
resetPassword.success: Password reset successfully. You can sign in now.

errors.weak: Password needs uppercase, lowercase, number and special character.
errors.invalidToken: Invalid or expired link. Request a new one.

imageUpload.hint: PNG, JPG or SVG up to {{max}}KB.
imageUpload.readError: Couldn't read the file. Try another.

help.title: Help
help.pageSubtitle: Full documentation for every screen and feature. Use search to find topics quickly.
help.selectTopic: Pick a topic on the left to get started.
help.notFoundBody: This screen doesn't have dedicated docs yet. Open the center to browse all topics.

workflow.guardDescription: Workflow rules require some steps before this status change.
workflow.missingField: Fill the "{{field}}" field in the form before confirming.
workflow.missingFieldsHint: Go back to the form, fill the highlighted fields and submit again.
workflow.approvalNotice: {{count}} approval(s) will be registered and the transition stays pending until all approvers respond.
